claims.text: Flagship/large regional research university. District energy system—often material on-site or cogenerated supply blended with grid purchases, not a simple “all kWh from the utility” footprint. 800–2,000 meters/submeters. Roughly mid–high seven figures annual utility spend typical at this scale. EnergyCAP incumbent (often via YearOut / Lobo resellers). Often a recently vacated / newly filled energy manager role. First contract: prioritize billing/regulatory and portfolio truth; deepen into chargeback when district allocation is the live problem.
